{{Quote|Sir, we're picking up a general alert on the secondary net. The relay at Mengjini has allegedly come under attack from a small group of, quote, dissident elements, unquote.|A communication officer to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
'''Mengjini''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bright Jewel sector/Legends|Bright Jewel sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Mengjini was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was the location of a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] relay [[Battle of Mengjini|attacked]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], probably by [[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]] terrorists.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
